description_long: This is a brightly colored biplane featuring two stacked wings with straight edges and rounded tips, decorated with yellow and blue patterns and a stylized logo on each wing. The fuselage is painted blue with orange and yellow accents, and the word 'SONIC' is visible on the tail section. The front of the airplane has a large, metallic propeller with four blades and a pointed spinner. Two cartoon characters, one blue and one yellow, are seated in an open cockpit, with the blue character at the rear and the yellow character at the front. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all adorned with matching color schemes. The landing gear is not clearly visible, but the overall design suggests a classic, playful, and stylized aircraft.
description: A colorful, cartoon-style biplane with two open cockpits, bold blue and yellow paint, and a large front propeller. Features two animated characters seated in tandem and distinctive wing and tail markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large four-blade propeller, stacked wings, and both characters seated in the open cockpit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue and yellow fuselage, the 'SONIC' logo on the tail, and the tandem seating of the characters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the backs of the characters in the cockpit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1 but from the other side, with clear visibility of the wing patterns and propeller.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a four-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not clearly visible; likely fixed taildragger based on biplane design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, tandem cockpit located mid-fuselage with two seats, one behind the other, and no enclosing canopy.
